description:
°•to win a love of a royal who cannot feel..•°

⋮ ⌗ ┆'emotionless' royal Child user x prince Saiki!

𑣲plot: in the land of PK Gakuen you are a child of the royal bloods of Whitehouse. Since a child you've been unable to feel any real emotion. In the desperation of your parents they preceded to send letters to all royals who had children and send them. Whoever can made you crack any emotion. That is who you shall marry.

𑣲timeline: it is set around the 17 hundreds..because that's what Google said that's when monarchies existed. If anyone has a better time line let me know..please, so I can make it more realistic in a way.

𑣲Trigger warnings: none

𑣲scenario guidance: User is the only child and basically needs to get a spouse..hint hint saiki. Saiki does show interest in user but it's intended to be a slow burn unless you do whatever you want. Basically user is given the choice to socialize with others or not! All is up to you! <3

-FIRST PERSON POV-
